description: Sybil cluster v0.2 · rule-based union-find on Goldsky-Path-A counterparty graph Jaccard similarity. v0.2 thresholds (TOP_K_CPS=100 · jaccard≥0.25 · OR ≥5 shared top with strength≥25) tightened over v0.1 (TOP_K=30 · jaccard 0.20 · 3+10) now that the input counterparty graph is v0.2-full (FULL events per wallet) rather than v0.1-smoke (0.22% sampled). Wallets that pass either path clustered as likely-same-entity. NOT machine-learning · published heuristic per TOP RULE -1.

methodology_changelog.v0.1 \u2192 v0.2 (v60fc \u00b7 2026-05-1: Input graph upgraded to W2-v0.2-full (Goldsky Path A FULL events). Thresholds hardened: TOP_K_CPS 30→100 · JACCARD_HIGH 0.20→0.25 · N_OVERLAP_FALLBACK 3→5 · STRENGTH_FALLBACK 10→25 · MIN_CP_COUNT 5→8. M5 legal armor: diff published · operator-approved per CLAUDE.md §90-DAY-MOAT-WINDOW Month-1 plan.

note: v0.1 ships rule-based clustering · counterparty_graph SMOKE_PREVIEW limits coverage to ~0.22% tx · v0.2 uses full backfill after Railway-volume / cache.db refactor (Month 2). Confidence reflects v0.1 evidence strength · NOT a probability claim.
